pkgmetadata.longdescription: Crashtest[[Tests](httpsgithub.comsdispatercrashtestactionsworkflowsmain.ymlbadge.svg)](httpsgithub.comsdispatercrashtestactionsworkflowsmain.yml)[[PyPI version](httpsimg.shields.iopypivcrashtest)](httpspypi.orgprojectcrashtest)Crashtest is a Python library that makes exceptions handling and inspection easier.
